creator: laszlof@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA256
 
Hello. Could you please fix the plist associated with this port, it
leaves many files laying around after deinstall. I have made some
modifications to correct some of the problems, you can fetch the
current shar file from:
http://people.freebsd.org/~laszlof/patches/bindlib.shar The build
errors associated with this port can be viewed at:
http://tinderbox.franksworld.org/logs/i386-5.4-release/bindlib-3.0.log

Thank you.

- --
- -----------------------------
Frank J. Laszlo
laszlof@FreeBSD.org
